prompt:
Reference image role: the previous blog thumbnail (mountains + glowing cube) defines the style — Chinese ink-wash painting fused with one soft modern tech metaphor, warm muted parchment-green background, low contrast, painterly soft edges. PRESERVE this style exactly.

Create a 16:9 blog thumbnail for article "Megatron 并行机制笔记". NO text.

Subject: Ink-wash painting of a distant fleet of ancient sailing ships sailing in formation across a misty sea, with parallel sail rows aligned (suggesting parallelism). Painted in soft grey-black brush strokes. Above the ships, faint golden #C0A35D parallel beams of light descend, illuminating each ship equally. A few tiny firefly cyan #9CF0BD lanterns on the masts.

Style: Brush-painted, atmospheric, suggests "synchronized fleet, parallel paths". Same warm parchment-green background.

Color HEX: ink black #1a1d1c, mist grey #3a4540, paper warm #2a3128, cyan #9CF0BD, gold #C0A35D.

Avoid: real text, characters, photographic realism, neon, red, purple, cartoonish, modern flat illustration.
